name: runewright
description: A skill and subagent factory with automatic briefing, generation, auditing, and feedback loops for Claude Code and Codex.

interface.longDescription: Design, generate, and audit reusable Agent Skills and subagent roles through one source-grounded, repeatable workflow.
defaultPrompt: Prepare a brief for a new skill.
Create a new skill using the Runewright blueprint.
Audit the installed skills and agents.
